note: Canonical species automatic-language helper used by the language progression step. Full languages block duplicate selection; partial/understand-only Basic remains visible but can still be upgraded with a bonus language pick.

Human.sourceLine: Automatic Language: All Humans can speak, read, and write Basic.

Aqualish.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Aqualish can speak, read, and write both Aqualish and Basic.

Bothan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Bothans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Bothese.

Cerean.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Cereans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Cerean.

Duro.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Duros can speak, read, and write both Basic and Durese.

languages.name: Ewokese
languages.note: No written form in the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Ewok.sourceLine: All Ewoks can speak Ewokese. They have no written form of their language.

languages.name: Gamorrean
languages.note: No written form in the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands, reads, and writes Basic, but cannot speak it.

Gamorrean.sourceLine: All Gamorreans can speak Gamorrean. They have no written version of the language. In addition, all Gamorreans understand, read, and write (but not speak) Basic.

Gungan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Gungans can speak, read, and write both Gunganese and Basic.

Hutt.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Hutts can speak, read, and write both Basic and Huttese.

Ithorian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ithorians can speak, read, and write Basic and Ithorese.

Kel Dor.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kel Dor can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kel Dor.

Mon Calamari.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Mon Calamari can speak, read, and write both Basic and Mon Calamarian.

Quarren.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Quarren can speak, read, and write both Basic and Quarrenese.

Rodian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Rodians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Rodese.

Sullustan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Sullustans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Sullustese.

Trandoshan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Trandoshans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Dosh.

Twi'lek.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Twi'leks can speak, read, and write both Basic and Ryl.

languages.name: Shyriiwook
languages.note: Native Wookiee speech.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but cannot speak it by default.

Wookiee.sourceLine: All Wookiees can speak Shyriiwook and understand Basic.

Zabrak.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Zabrak can speak, read, and write both Basic and Zabrak.

Chistori.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Chistori can speak, read, and write Chistori.

Replica Droid.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Replica Droids can speak, read, and write Binary. All Replica Droids also learn the native language of the Species they are replicating (typically Basic for Humans).

Utai.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Utai can speak, read, and write Utapese.

Arkanian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Arkanians can speak, read, and write both Arkanian and Basic.

Arkanian Offshoot.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Arkanian Offshoots can speak, read, and write both Basic and Arkanian (albeit with a distinct accent).

Cathar.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Cathar can speak, read, and write both Basic and Catharese.

Draethos.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Draethos can speak, read, and write both Basic and Draethos.

Feeorin.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Feeorin can speak, read, and write both Basic and Feeorin

Khil.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Khil can speak, read, and write both Basic and Khilese.

Kissai.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kissai can speak, read, and write both Basic and Sith.

languages.name: Sith
languages.note: Speaks Sith; read/write is automatic only with Intelligence 12 or higher.

Massassi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Massassi can speak Sith, Massassi with an Intelligence score of 12 or higher can automatically read and write Sith as well.

Rakata.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Rakata can speak, read, and write Rakata.

Selkath.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Selkath can speak, read, and write Selkath.

Snivvian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Snivvians can speak, read, and write Snivvian.

Aleena.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Aleena can speak, read, and write both Aleena and Basic

Caamasi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Caamasi can speak, read, and write both Basic and Caamasi.

Felucian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Felucians can speak, read, and write Felucianese.

Gran.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Gran can speak, read, and write both Basic and Gran.

Noghri.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Noghri can speak, read, and write Honoghran.

Alternate Noghri.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Noghri can speak, read, and write both Honoghran.

Nosaurian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nosaurians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Nosaurian.

Talz.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Talz can speak, read, and write Talz.

Togorian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Togorians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Togorian.

Togruta.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Togrutas can speak, read, and write both Basic and Togruti.

languages.name: Whiphid
languages.note: No written form in the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Whiphid.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Whiphids can speak Whiphid. There is no written language for Whiphid.

Yarkora.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Yarkora can speak, read, and write both Basic and Yarkora.

Balosar.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Balosars can speak, read, and write both Basic and Balosar.

Blood Carver.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Blood Carvers can speak, read, and write both Basic and Batorese.

Clawdite.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Clawdites can speak, read, and write both Basic and Clawdite.

Falleen.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Falleen can speak, read, and write both Basic and Falleen.

languages.name: Gand
languages.note: Gand can learn to read, write, and understand other languages, but need a Transliterator to speak them.

Gand.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Gand can speak, read, and write Gand. A Gand can learn to read, write, and understand other languages, but cannot speak them without the aid of a Transliterator.

Houk.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Houk can speak, read, and write both Basic and Houkese.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Jawa.sourceLine: All Jawas can speak, read, and write both Jawaese and the Jawa Trade Language.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Alternate Jawa.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Jawas can speak, read, and write both Jawaese and the Jawa Trade Language.

Ryn.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ryn can speak, read, and write both Basic and Ryn.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Toydarian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Toydarians can speak, read, and write both Huttese and Toydarian.

Ubese.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ubese can speak, read, and write both Basic and Ubese. Additionally, they can communicate through Ubeninal, a sign language that serves as the primary medium for communication among Ubese.

Wroonian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Wroonians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Wroonian.

Dug.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Dugs can speak, read, and write Dug.

Gen'Dai.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Gen'Dai can speak, read, and write both Basic and Gen'Dai.

Geonosian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Geonosians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Geonosian.

Iktotchi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Iktotchi can speak, read, and write both Basic and Iktotchese.

Kaleesh.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kaleesh can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kaleesh.

Kaminoan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kaminoans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kaminoan.

Alternate Kaminoan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kaminoans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kaminoan.

Kerkoiden.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Kerkoiden can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kerkoidese.

languages.name: Nautila
languages.note: Communicates in Nautila; out of water much of its meaning is lost.

Nautolan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nautolans can communicate in Nautila, and can speak, read, and write Basic.

Nelvaanian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nelvaanians can speak, read, and write Nelvaanese.

The Human Clones produced by the Kaminoa.species: The Human Clones produced by the Kaminoans for the Republic
The Human Clones produced by the Kaminoa.sourceLine: Automatic Language: All Republic Clones can speak, read, and write Basic.

Vurk.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Vurks can speak, read, and write both Basic and Semblan.

Advozse.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Advozsec can speak, read, and write both Advb and Basic.

Chagrian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Chagrians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Chagri.

Codru-Ji.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Codru-Ji can speak, read, and write both Basic and Codruese.

Klatooinian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Klatooinians can speak, read, and write Huttese.

Nagai.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nagai can speak, read, and write both Basic and Nagaian.

Sakiyan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Sakiyans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Sakiyan.

Vahla.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Vahla can speak, read, and write both Basic and Vahla.

Weequay.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Weequay can speak, read, and write Sriluurian.

Yuuzhan Vong.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Yuuzhan Vong can speak, read, and write Yuuzhan Vong.

Alternate Yuuzhan Vong.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Yuuzhan Vong can speak, read, and write Yuuzhan Vong.

Zeltron.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Zeltrons can speak, read, and write Basic.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Celegian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Celegians can understand Basic.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Requires a computer connection or vocabulator to communicate with most creatures.

languages.name: Binary
languages.note: Requires a computer connection or vocabulator to communicate with most creatures.

Shard.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Shards can speak, read, and write both Basic and Binary. Shards can communicate with other creatures only when connected to a computer or a Vocabulator.

Vultan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Vultans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Dromnyr.

Barabel.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Barabels can speak, read, and write Barabel.

Dashade.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Dashade can speak, read, and write Dashadi.

Lurmen.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Lurmen can speak, read, and write both Basic and Lurmese.

Taung.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Taung can speak, read, and write both Basic and Mando'a.

Thakwaash.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Thakwaash can speak, read, and write Thakwaashi.

Trianii.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Trianii can speak, read, and write Trianii.

Yevetha.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Yevetha can speak, read, and write Yevethan.

languages.name: Yuzz
languages.note: No written form in the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Yuzzem.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Yuzzem can speak Yuzz. They have no written form of their language.

Zygerrian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Zygerrians can speak, read, and write Basic.

Bith.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Bith can speak, read, and write both Basic and Bith.

Alternate Bith.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Bith can speak, read, and write both Basic and Bith.

Defel.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Defel can speak, read, and write both Basic and Defel.

Elomin.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Elomin can speak, read, and write both Basic and Elomin.

Fosh.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Fosh can speak, read, and write both Basic and Fosh.

Givin.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Givin can speak, read, and write both Basic and Givin.

Gotal.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Gotals can speak, read, and write both Basic and Gotal.

Herglic.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Herglics can speak, read, and write both Basic and Herglic.

Mrlssi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Mrlssi can speak, read, and write both Basic and Mrlsstese.

Neimoidian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Neimoidians can speak, read and write both Basic and Neimoidian.

Nyriaanan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nyriaanans can speak, read, and write Nyriaanan.

Pa'lowick.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Pa'lowicks can speak, read, and write both Basic and Lowickese.

Umbaran.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Umbarans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Umbarese.

Alternate Umbaran.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Umbarans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Umbarese.

Altiri.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Altiri can speak, read, and write both Altirish and Basic.

Anzati.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Anzati can speak, read, and write both Anzat and Basic.

Anarrian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Anarrians can speak, read, and write both Anarrese and Basic.

Chadra-Fan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Chadra-Fans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Chadra-Fan.

Alternate Chadra-Fan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Chadra-Fans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Chadra-Fan.

Ebruchi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ebruchi can speak, read, and write Ebruchese.

Ishi Tib.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ishi Tib can speak, read, and write both Basic and Tibranese.

Killik.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Killiks can speak, read, and write both Killik and Sy Bisti.

Krevaaki.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Krevaaki can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kreva.

Alternate Krevaaki.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Krevaaki can speak, read, and write both Basic and Kreva.

Lugubraa.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Lugubraa can speak, read, and write Lugubraal.

Nikto.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nikto can speak, read, and write Nikto, as well as either Basic or Huttese (chosen at Character Creation).

O'reenian.sourceLine: Automatic Language: All O'reenians can speak, read, and write O'reenian.

Shistavanen.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Shistavanen can speak, read, and write Shistavanen.

Sluissi.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Sluissi can speak, read, and write both Basic and Sluiussese.

Sorcerer of Rhand.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Sorcerers of Rhand can speak, read, and write Basic. They can also select three additional bonus languages at 1st level.

Squib.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Squibs can speak, read, and write both Basic and Squibbian.

Ssi-Ruuk.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Ssi-Ruuk can speak, read, and write Ssi-Ruuvi.

Tof.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Tofs can speak, read, and write Tof.

Vagaari.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Vagaari can speak, read, and write both Sy Bisti and Vagaari.

Verpine.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Verpine can speak, read, and write both Basic and Verpine.

languages.name: Amanese
languages.note: No written form in the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Amani.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Amanin can speak Amanese. They have no written form of their language.

Arcona.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Arcona can speak, read, and write both Arconese and Basic.

Devaronian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Devaronians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Devaronese.

Nazren.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Nazren can speak, read, and write both Basic and Nazren.

Pau'an.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Pau'ans can speak, read, and write both Basic and Utapese.

Phindian.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Phindians can speak, read, and write both Basic and Phindian.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands, reads, and writes Basic, but does not speak it by default.

languages.name: Massan
languages.note: Understands, reads, and writes Massan, but does not speak it by default.

Polis Massan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Polis Massans can understand, read, and write both Basic and Massan.

languages.name: Skakoverbal
languages.note: Spoken Skakoan language.

languages.name: Skakoform
languages.note: Written Skakoan language.

Skakoan.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Skakoans can speak Skakoverbal, read and write Skakoform, and speak, read, and write Basic.

Stereb.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Stereb can speak, read, and write Stereb.

languages.name: Tusken
languages.note: No written form is granted by the species rules.

languages.name: Basic
languages.note: Understands Basic but does not speak it by default.

Tusken Raider.sourceLine: Automatic Languages: All Tusken Raiders can speak Tusken.
